emails.subject: Re: Cargill NDA
emails.body: Re: Cargill NDA Hi Tana: We have an executed agreement protecting Cargill Steel and Wire, a department of Cargill Inc. re possible provision by ENA of risk management services to Cargill. From Rodney Malcolm's group December 2000 to December 2001. I imagine we have confidential information from the steel and wire department, but that should not be a problem if your agreement is specific to software related information. Kay C. Young Legal Specialist Enron North America Corp. 713-853-6794 Phone 713-646-3393 Fax kay.young@enron.com Tana Jones 05/14/2001 11:01 AM
